title: Haricot Surprise Delight
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish that showcases the surprise ingredient. Perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together haricot beans, silky potatoes, and surprise ingredient.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes or until lightly browned.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
